name: Feature request / Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to prompt-improver
title: ''

---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
Describe the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What change or addition would help?

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways this could be addressed.

**Impact on portability**
How should this work (or gracefully degrade) across different coding CLIs (Claude Code, Grok, Gemini, Cline, OpenCode, Kiro, etc.)?

**Additional context**
Links, examples, or related prompts.
